# README Completion Checklist

Use this file as the operational checklist after updating README files.

## Common Checks

- Uses concise English.
- Required headings exist in the correct order.
- Links point to valid resources.
- markdownlint passes with zero errors.

## Top-Level README Checks

- Top-level README structure follows its required section order.

## Project README Checks

- Includes `## Table of Contents <!-- omit in toc -->` before Overview.
- Does not include `## Development`.
- Usage appears only when it adds value.

### Library Project Checks

- Includes `## Features` immediately after Overview.
- `## Features` has about 20 representative items when information is available.

### Test Project Checks

- Includes `## Test Index` immediately after `## Test Target`.
- Test index links point to folders, not individual files.
